description.value:
An ingeniously engineered bow with folding clockwork limbs, small enough to hide under a coat when collapsed. Devastating against unprepared targets who never saw it coming.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d4 (30/120), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged d4 (60/240), Piercing, Clockwork, Conceal, Hipshot
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged d4 (60/240), Piercing, Clockwork, Conceal, Hipshot, ambush mastery
Master PerkA hit against a surprised creature with this weapon is automatically a critical hit.

rmeData.masterPerk: A hit against a surprised creature with this weapon is automatically a critical hit.
